use_cases: Adding premium cursor effects to SaaS landing pages for enhanced user engagement
Implementing particle trail effects on developer portfolio websites for visual distinction
Creating interactive cursor feedback on creative agency sites to showcase design polish
Enhancing e-commerce product pages with cursor-triggered particle effects on hover
Building engaging mouse interaction systems for interactive art installations
ai_summary: A sophisticated cursor effects engine featuring particle systems, trail effects, and physics simulation. The component tracks mouse velocity and position to generate colorful particle bursts and trailing effects on user interaction. Built with canvas rendering and adaptive performance monitoring, it provides a premium interactive experience suitable for desktop and mobile platforms.
